text: Number one Wii sports does not use a Wii fit board so you can play some sports games without it and that’s the same with punch out number two yes you do have to use that remote but there’s a red strap so it doesn’t fall down third of all that long cord is so you can place it above your TV or below, and you can always put the cord behind the wii and leave the motion bar out you can also get some GameCube games in case if your child wants to relax, and the Wii is way more cheaper
text_zh: 第一，Wii Sports 不需要 Wii Fit 板，所以有些运动游戏可以在没有它的情况下玩，Punch Out 也是一样。第二，是的，你需要用那个遥控器，但它有腕带，所以不会掉下来。第三，那个长线是为了让你把它放在电视上方或下方，你也可以把线藏在 Wii 后面，把感应条拿出来。你也可以买一些GameCube游戏，以防你的孩子想放松一下，而且Wii便宜多了。

text: again. go and buy a Wii. it is ahead of its time and will never compare to any modern technology. big controllers equals easier control over the game you're playing. if you so badly crave having everything wireless get a switch. and wires are not a inconvenience unless you're constantly going to be moving the console around. which a lot of consoles are not designed to be moved around unless they're portable. like the Wii u or the switch.
text_zh: 再说一次，去买个 Wii 吧。它超越时代，永远无法与任何现代技术相比。大控制器意味着更容易控制游戏。如果你那么渴望无线，就买个 Switch。而且除非你打算经常移动主机，否则线缆不是什么不方便的事。很多主机都不是为移动设计的，除非是便携的。比如 Wii U 或 Switch。

text: Call me a hypocrite but WHO WANTS A GAME THAT LOOKS LIKE EVERY MOBILE GAME but the Wii has super smash brothers Mario Kart also Zelda and super Mario
text_zh: 说我虚伪也行，但谁想要一个看起来跟所有手游一样的游戏呢？Wii 有超级马里奥兄弟、马里奥赛车，还有塞尔达和超级马里奥。

text: A Wii is way better than ts
text_zh: Wii比这玩意儿好多了

text: but compare the graphics of the will to the playground
text_zh: 但看看这个和游乐场的画面对比

text: you can very easily just mod the wii and have a ton of games via a usb drive
text_zh: 其实很简单，你可以破解Wii，然后通过USB硬盘玩一大堆游戏

text: nintendo gonna sue u bro💔
text_zh: 任天堂要告你 bro 💔

text: Mod the wii, download some games, and get UsbLoaderGX. (also most games don't require the balance board? the only one I can think of is wii fit and wii fit plus) its also much cheaper than a playground. the playground is $250 with what I assume to have modding abilities. The wii is around $30+ multiple mod supported software (homebrew channel, Usbloader etc.) Nex only included 5 games in the starter pack. The wii has over 3000 if your willing to spend money on some first party titles like mario or zelda which are usually around $20. but if you don't wanna pay for games, buy an SD card, mod your wii, and download them
text_zh: 破解wii，下载点游戏，然后装上UsbLoaderGX。(而且大部分游戏不需要平衡板吧？我唯一能想到的就是wii fit和wii fit plus) 比游乐场便宜多了。那个游乐场250美元，我猜是自带破解能力的。wii大概30美元+各种破解软件（homebrew channel, Usbloader等）。Nex的入门包只带了5个游戏。而wii有超过3000个游戏，如果你愿意花钱买些像马里奥或塞尔达这种第一方游戏，通常在20美元左右。但如果你不想花钱买游戏，就买个SD卡，破解wii，然后下载。

text: you can also get a Wii for 20 bucks get a SD card for another 20 then jail break it so free games
text_zh: 你也可以花20块钱买个Wii，再花20块买个SD卡，然后破解一下，就能玩免费游戏了

text: When I was a young kid none of these were ever an issue? Also the games were actually good
text_zh: 我小时候，这些都不是问题？而且那时候游戏真的很好玩

text: A Wii is also like 50 bucks including a balance board and games
text_zh: 买个 Wii 也才 50 块，还包含体感板和游戏

text: I've seen reviews on all of these their not worth your time
text_zh: 我看了这些产品的评测，都不值得花时间

text: overpriced box that plays glorified mobile games vs beloved console with professionally made games including Nintendo 😭
text_zh: 又贵又只配玩劣质手游的盒子 vs 大家都爱的、有专业制作游戏（包括任天堂）的主机 😭

text: Wii got better games
text_zh: Wii有更好的游戏

text: Wii is so peak and cheaper and better🔥
text_zh: Wii 太巅峰了，又便宜又好 🔥

text: so your argument is that it’s a smaller console so it’s better lol what
text_zh: 所以你的论点是它是个小型主机所以更好lol，什么鬼

text: dude i’ve literally been playing on a wii ever since i was like, 7 years old and had absolutely no problems with it
text_zh: 哥们，我自从 7 岁就一直在玩 Wii，从来没遇到过任何问题

text: Spread the word kids now want a Wii
text_zh: 孩子们现在都想买 Wii 了，快告诉他们！

text: Ts worse than the kinect
text_zh: 比Kinect还糟糕

text: Well clearly Wii’s worth it seeing as you bought it and still own it 💔✌
text_zh: 嗯，很明显Wii很值，毕竟你都买了还在用 💔✌
20 块 vs 249 块

text: You can buy a Wii and a ton of games/accessories for that price.
text_zh: 花这个钱你可以买个Wii和一大堆游戏/配件。

text: Looks like so much fun 😍😍😍
text_zh: 看起来太好玩了😍😍😍

text: The playground isnt bad its just not for people over 6
text_zh: 这个游乐场不算差，就是不适合 6 岁以上的人玩

text: Your holding a phone
text_zh: 你在拿手机

text: Wii still better
text_zh: Wii 仍然更好

text: 250.. at that point you can buy like 6 wiis
text_zh: 250.. 那个价钱可以买6个 Wii 了

text: $250 for mobile games and a glorified Xbox Kinect 😭 If the size is the issue get a Wii mini. It's cheaper and you get can WAYYYY more. Found this in 10 seconds on Facebook marketplace
text_zh: 250美元买手游和个升级版Xbox Kinect😭如果嫌大就买个Wii mini。它更便宜，而且你能得到多得多的东西。10秒就在Facebook marketplace上找到了

text: you can buy a wii, plenty of fun family friendly games your child will adore for years to come, including the wii fit pad, and you’ll get this all cheaper than what this is, plus WAY better games
text_zh: 你可以买个Wii，有很多孩子会喜欢多年的家庭友好游戏，包括Wii Fit板，而且你会比这个便宜得多，而且游戏还好得多

text: All being sent to china
text_zh: 全发往中国了

text: literally a black wii
text_zh: 简直就是个黑色的 Wii

text: Wii is so much better 😭😭
text_zh: Wii好太多了😭😭

text: The Wii is one of the best selling consoles for a reason😔✌🏿
text_zh: Wii 之所以成为最畅销的主机之一是有原因的😔✌🏿

text: Can it play mario kart
text_zh: 能玩马里奥赛车吗

text: The Wii is probably one of the best consoles and you get play GameCube games if you get the right version
text_zh: Wii可能是最好的主机之一，而且如果你买对版本还能玩GameCube的游戏

text: a modded wii will run you like 75 bucks 😭
text_zh: 改过的Wii大概75块钱就能搞定😭

text: trash
text_zh: 垃圾

text: Get a Wii and mod it with games ✌
text_zh: 搞个Wii然后刷机玩游戏吧 ✌

text: the Wii also while being old is a cracked console you can get all kinds of games for free you don't need to pay for this new crap just go to a pawn shop or thrift store pick up a Wii and learn homebrew you'll save yourself money
text_zh: Wii虽然老了，但它是个破解版主机，你可以免费拿到各种游戏，不用花钱买这些新垃圾，去当铺或旧货店随便挑个Wii，学会怎么玩破解版，你就能省钱了。

text: mod the wii
text_zh: 给Wii刷机

text: "the games come bundled so that you don't have to buy them" yeah thanks for mentioning the subscription part to access the games, which is basically paying for the games. $49 for 3 months or $89 for year is CRAZY, super disingenuous review.
text_zh: “游戏是打包好的，所以不用另外买” 谢谢你提到需要订阅才能玩游戏，那不就是变相在为游戏买单。3个月49美元或1年89美元太疯狂了，这评测太不真诚了。

text: the Wii has actually good games and is super easy to mod to get hella games for free and wiis are relatively cheap this shit look ahh in comparison
text_zh: Wii 有真正好玩的游戏，而且很容易破解，可以免费玩到很多游戏，而且 Wii 也很便宜，这玩意儿比起来看起来太垃圾了

text: okay so of Xbox one with Kinect. it went away for a reason. kids will play for 20 mins then get bored.
text_zh: 好的，关于Xbox one with Kinect。它消失是有原因的。孩子们玩20分钟就会腻。

text: get a used xbox 360 and a kinect, both of those together are still cheaper than this, about $50-60 on ebay, and it has better games, the wii had better games but if you want the no controller thing its the way to go
text_zh: 买个二手的 Xbox 360 和 Kinect，加起来都比这个便宜，在 eBay 上大概 50-60 美元，而且游戏更多。Wii 游戏也多，但如果你想要不用手柄的，那 Kinect 是个选择。

text: You must be smoking opium if you think people are buying that over a Wii
text_zh: 如果你觉得人们会买这个而不是 Wii，那你肯定吸毒了

text: It’s the same price on the Walmart website. Safer buying or doing store pickup through there.
text_zh: 和沃尔玛网站上价格一样。在那边买或者用门店自提更放心。

text: just bye a wii gang
text_zh: 直接买个Wii吧大家

text: This has to be spyware like don’t buy this
text_zh: 这个肯定有间谍软件，别买

text: "you can use your body" just buy an xbox 360 with a kinect 💔🥀
text_zh: “你可以用你的身体”直接买个带 Kinect 的 Xbox 360 吧 💔🥀

text: On top of buying this junk you gotta get a subscription for it too, so don’t waste your money on this
text_zh: 买这破玩意儿还要订阅，别浪费钱了

text: no one buying this. also how does no one know what the Wii fit board is?
text_zh: 没人买这个。而且怎么没人知道Wii Fit板是什么啊？

text: Wii is 200$ cheaper and gots the larger library, I know your getting paid for this but the techtok fellas are bloodthirsty and ruthless
text_zh: Wii便宜200美元，游戏库也更大，我知道你在收钱，但TechTok那帮人简直就是吸血鬼，又狠又凶残

text: hell naw, don't trash talk the wii 🥀
text_zh: 得了吧，别黑Wii 🥀

text: Nex blocks modding 🥀🥀
text_zh: Nex blocks 正在玩呢 🥀🥀

text: good off that bro
text_zh: 太好了，哥们

text: No thanks Im sticking to the Wii
text_zh: 不用了，我还是玩Wii

text: Ngl I got mine for 20 and I modded so Whatchu mean plus isn’t Wii sports a game…
text_zh: 讲真，我20块买的，还刷了机，你说的啥啊，而且Wii Sports不是游戏吗…

text: I am not spending 40 dollars when there is literally so much more games 2 do with a Wii! With Mario tennis, Wii sports, Wii play, even other amazing titles you don know boyt
text_zh: 我不会花 40 块钱，因为 Wii 有太多游戏可以玩了！有马里奥网球、Wii Sports、Wii Play，甚至还有其他你不知道的超棒游戏
